title: cliffortia strobilifera
intro: Cliffortia strobilifera, also known as the Cape star-burst, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rhamnaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Cliffortia strobilifera is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and is also used to treat skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
